map.title: Hospital Map
map.instructions: Tap a module to see details. Use buttons to change floors.

modules.title: Modules
modules.selectModule: Select a module to view its specialties
modules.noSpecialties: This module has no assigned specialties

tips.noTips: No tips available for this module

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.subtitle: Emergency and evacuation information
emergency.instructions: For emergencies, go to the emergency module located at the main entrance.
emergency.fire: In case of fire: Activate the alarm, evacuate the building using stairs, do not use elevators.
emergency.earthquake: In case of earthquake: Get under a sturdy table, protect your head, stay away from windows.
emergency.evacuation: Evacuation: Follow marked escape routes in red, head to the nearest exit.
emergency.stayCalm: Stay calm and follow the staff's instructions.
emergency.callInstructions: For serious medical emergencies, call immediately.
emergency.ifTrapped: If trapped, call emergency number and wait for help.
emergency.floor1Instructions: Both exits on the 1st floor lead directly outside.
emergency.floor2Instructions: Use the stairs to go down to the 1st floor and exit through the main exits.

error.title: Error
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.network: Connection error. Check your internet connection.
error.notFound: What you were looking for was not found.

empty.searchDescription: Type the name of a specialty or module to begin.
empty.favoritesDescription: Mark specialties as favorites to see them here.
empty.historyDescription: Your search history will appear here.
